== Notes for [[Item:Q107159|Q107159]] ==

ID: I180886

Name: Itlaf ibn Na'im al-Lakhmi 1

Sex: M

Birth: ABT 754 in Arabia 1

Birth: in Abt. 804, Arabia 1

Event: Relationship (J,M&L) 39th Great-grandparent 1

Father: Na'im II al-Lakhmi b: ABT 730

Marriage 1 Spouse Unknown

Children

Amr ibn Itaf al-Lakhmi b: 779 in Baghdad

Sources:

Title: loren.ged

Repository:

Media: Other

Text: Date of Import: Apr 12, 2006

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000001215748947

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
